/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/runtime_integration_tests.dir/integration/test_event_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_integration_tests.dir/integration/test_tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_integration_tests.dir/integration/test_http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_integration_tests.dir/stress/test_concurrency_smoke.cpp.o -o runtime_integration_tests  /usr/local/lib/libgtest_main.a ../libruntime_net.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a ../libruntime_foundation.a
